---
output: github_document
---

<!-- SOURCE for the "Agricultural productivity (Ghana)" area page (docs/_pages/topic-production.md).
     Self-contained & independently editable. pub_area_page() lists this area's
     papers from the links.csv manifests; for an area with sub-topics (e.g.
     risk-management) it prints one section per sub-topic. Build with render.R. -->

[&larr; All publications](https://ftsiboe.github.io/publications/)

```{r production, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
source("data-raw/scripts/site_helpers.R")
pub_area_page("production")
```

[&larr; All publications](https://ftsiboe.github.io/publications/)
